eval_name: Safely rename a symbol across files
prompt: Rename NamespaceRegistry to FeatureRegistry across the entire workspace. Show me the edit plan before applying. After applying, confirm no compile errors were introduced.
assertions: Shows an edit plan listing all affected files before applying
Updates import statements, not just the declaration
Runs diagnostics or reports compile status after the rename
Does not leave broken references in any module
expected_output: A multi-file rename plan and validated post-edit status.
